          have : m ^ 2 > 16 := by omega

      rw [h, Nat.add_mod, Nat.mul_mod_right, Nat.zero_mod, Nat.zero_add, Nat.mul_mod, hn_sq_mod]
      rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_one, Nat.sub_mod_eq_add_mod_of_le (by linarith)]
      rw [Nat.mul_mod_right, Nat.zero_add, Nat.mod_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by linarith)]
    
    have hk_val : ∃ M, k ^ 2 + 4 = M * p ∧ M ≥ 1 := by
      have : (k ^ 2 + 4) % p = 0 := by rw [Nat.add_mod, hk_sq_mod, Nat.sub_add_cancel (by linarith), Nat.mod_self]
      use (k ^ 2 + 4) / p
      constructor
      · rw [Nat.div_mul_cancel (Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero.mpr this)]
      · by_contra h; rw [not_le, Nat.lt_one_iff] at h; rw [h, Nat.zero_mul] at this; linarith

    have hk_ineq : k ^ 2 > 2 * n := by
      rcases hk_val with ⟨M, hM, hM_ge⟩
      have hk2 : k ^ 2 = M * p - 4 := Nat.eq_sub_of_add_eq hM
      by_cases hM1 : M = 1
      · rw [hM1, Nat.one_mul] at hk2
        -- k^2 = p - 4. Since p > 13, k^2 > 9 => k >= 4. k is odd (p is odd, 2n even), so k >= 5.
        have k_odd : k % 2 = 1 := by
          rw [Nat.sub_mod_of_le (le_of_lt hn2p), Nat.mul_mod_right, Nat.sub_zero]
          exact Nat.Prime.mod_two_eq_one_iff_ne_two.mpr (by linarith)
        have k_ge_5 : k ≥ 5 := by
          have : k ^ 2 > 9 := by rw [hk2]; linarith
          have : k > 3 := Nat.sqrt_lt_sqrt_iff.mpr this
          have : k ≠ 4 := by intro; rw [a] at k_odd; norm_num at k_odd
          linarith
        -- Need k^2 > p - k <=> k^2 > (k^2+4) - k <=> k > 4. True.
        rw [hk2]; rw [Nat.sub_sub_assoc (by linarith), Nat.sub_lt_iff_lt_add]
        linarith
      · -- M >= 2. k^2 >= 2p - 4. Need k^2 > p - k.
        -- 2p - 4 > p - k <=> p + k > 4. True.
        have : M ≥ 2 := by omega
        have : k ^ 2 ≥ 2 * p - 4 := by
          rw [hk2]; apply Nat.sub_le_sub_right; apply Nat.mul_le_mul_right p this
        apply lt_of_lt_of_le (y := 2 * p - 4)
        · rw [Nat.sub_lt_iff_lt_add (by linarith)]; linarith
        · exact this

    -- p > 2n + sqrt(2n) <=> p - 2n > sqrt(2n) <=> k > sqrt(2n) <=> k^2 > 2n
    rw [gt_iff_lt, ← Nat.sub_lt_iff_lt_add (le_of_lt hn2p), ← Real.sqrt_lt_iff_sq_lt, Real.sq_sqrt (by linarith)]
    norm_cast

intro N
  let K := max (max (N ^ 2 + 2) 14) N
  let M := (K !)^2 + 1
  let p := M.minFac
  have hp : p.Prime := Nat.minFac_prime (Nat.ne_of_gt (Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_add_left _ _) (Nat.lt_succ_self _))))
  have hp_dvd_M : p ∣ M := Nat.minFac_dvd M
  have hp_gt_K : p > K := by
    by_contra h
    have h_le : p ≤ K := Nat.le_of_not_gt h
    have : p ∣ K ! := Nat.dvd_factorial hp.pos h_le
    have : p ∣ (K !)^2 := Nat.dvd_trans this (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ _)
    have : p ∣ 1 := (Nat.dvd_add_iff_right this).mp hp_dvd_M
    exact Nat.Prime.not_dvd_one hp this
  
  have hp_odd : p % 2 = 1 := by
    rw [Nat.prime_iff] at hp
    rcases hp with ⟨_, _⟩
    by_contra h_even
    rw [Nat.mod_two_ne_one] at h_even
    have : p = 2 := Nat.Prime.eq_two_of_dvd_two (by assumption) (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero h_even)
    rw [this] at hp_gt_K
    have : K ≥ 14 := le_max_left _ _ |> le_max_left _ _
    linarith

  let n0 := (K !) % p
  let n := if n0 ≤ p / 2 then n0 else p - n0
  
  have hn_le : n ≤ p / 2 := by
    split_ifs
    · assumption
    · apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
      rw [Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
      have : 2 * (p / 2) + 1 = p := Nat.div_add_mod p 2 ▸ hp_odd ▸ rfl
      linarith

  have hn_dvd : p ∣ n^2 + 1 := by
    have h1 : ((K !)^2 + 1) % p = 0 := Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd hp_dvd_M
    have h2 : ((K !) % p)^2 % p = (K !)^2 % p := by
       rw [Nat.pow_mod, Nat.mod_mod, ←Nat.pow_mod]
    rw [Nat.add_mod, h2, ←Nat.add_mod, h1] at h2
    have h_n0 : (n0^2 + 1) % p = 0 := by
      rw [Nat.add_mod, Nat.pow_mod, ←Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ hp.pos)]
      rw [←Nat.pow_mod, ←Nat.add_mod]
      convert h1 using 2
      rw [Nat.pow_mod]
      exact Nat.mod_mod _ _
    simp [n]
    split_ifs
    · exact Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero h_n0
    · rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, Nat.add_mod]
      have : (p - n0)^2 % p = n0^2 % p := by
         have : (p : ℤ) - n0 = - (n0 : ℤ) + p := by ring
         norm_cast
         rw [Nat.pow_mod, Nat.pow_mod n0]
         apply Int.ofNat_inj.mp
         simp only [Int.ofNat_mod_natCast]
         rw [show ((p - n0 : ℕ) : ℤ) = (p:ℤ) - n0 by exact Int.ofNat_sub (le_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ hp.pos))]
         rw [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm]
         rw [sq, mul_add, add_mul, add_mul]
         simp only [Int.add_mul_mod_self, Int.mul_add_mod_self_left, Int.mul_add_mod_self_right, zero_add, add_zero]
         rw [sq, neg_mul_neg]
      rw [this, ←Nat.add_mod]
      exact h_n0

  have hn_ge_N : n ≥ N := by
    have : p ≤ n^2 + 1 := Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.succ_pos _) hn_dvd
    have : n^2 + 1 > N^2 + 1 := by
      calc n^2 + 1 ≥ p := this
           _ > K := hp_gt_K
           _ ≥ N^2 + 2 := le_max_left _ _ |> le_max_left _ _
           _ > N^2 + 1 := Nat.lt_succ_self _
    exact Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_pow_lt_pow_left 2 (Nat.zero_le _) (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ this))

  have h_ineq : (p : ℝ) > 2 * n + Real.sqrt (2 * n) := by
    let k := p - 2 * n
    have hk : p = 2 * n + k := (Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add (by linarith)).mp rfl
    have hk_pos : k > 0 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by intro z; rw [z, add_zero] at hk; have := hp_odd; rw [hk] at this; simp at this)
    have hp_gt_13 : p > 13 := by
      calc p > K := hp_gt_K
           _ ≥ 14 := le_max_left _ _ |> le_max_right _ _
           _ > 13 := by norm_num
    
    have h_div_k : p ∣ k^2 + 4 := by
      have : (p : ℤ) ∣ (k : ℤ)^2 + 4 := by
        have h : (p : ℤ) ∣ 4 * ((n : ℤ)^2 + 1) := Int.ofNat_dvd.mpr (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ _ hn_dvd)
        rw [show 4 * ((n : ℤ)^2 + 1) = (2 * n)^2 + 4 by ring] at h
        have : (2 * n : ℤ) = (p : ℤ) - k := by simp [hk]
        rw [this] at h
        rw [sub_sq, add_assoc] at h
        exact (Int.dvd_add_iff_left (Int.dvd_sub (Int.dvd_mul_right _ _) (Int.dvd_mul_right _ _))).mp h
      exact Int.ofNat_dvd.mp this

    have hk_ge_5 : k ≥ 5 := by
      have : k % 2 = 1 := by
        rw [←Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left _ _ n, ←hk]
        exact hp_odd
      have : k ≠ 1 := by
         intro h; rw [h] at h_div_k; have : p = 5 := Nat.Prime.eq_five_of_dvd_five hp h_div_k
         linarith
      have : k ≠ 3 := by
         intro h; rw [h] at h_div_k; have : p = 13 := Nat.Prime.eq_of_dvd_of_prime hp (by decide) h_div_k
         linarith
      -- Unroll small cases manually to avoid tactic complexities
      cases k; contradiction
      rename_i k; cases k; rw [Nat.mod_two_of_bodd] at this; simp at this
      rename_i k; cases k; contradiction
      rename_i k; cases k; rw [Nat.mod_two_of_bodd] at this; simp at this
      rename_i k; cases k; contradiction
      exact le_add_left _ _

    have hk_sq_gt : k^2 > 2 * n := by
      have : p ≤ k^2 + 4 := Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.succ_pos _) h_div_k
      cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le this with
      | inl h_eq =>
        rw [hk, h_eq]
        apply Nat.lt_of_add_lt_add_right
        rw [add_comm (2*n), add_comm _ 4]
        apply Nat.add_lt_add_left
        exact hk_ge_5
      | inr h_lt =>
         have : p ≤ (k^2 + 4) / 2 := Nat.le_div_of_mul_le (by norm_num) (Nat.le_of_mul_le_mul_right (b:=2) (by
           rw [Nat.mul_comm, ← Nat.dvd_iff_mul_right_eq] at h_div_k
           rcases h_div_k with ⟨m, hm⟩
           have : m ≥ 2 := by
             by_contra; have : m = 1 := by linarith; 
             rw [this, mul_one] at hm; rw [hm] at h_lt; exact lt_irrefl _ h_lt
           rw [hm]; exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left p this
         ) (by norm_num))
         have : k^2 + k > p := by
            calc p ≤ (k^2 + 4) / 2 := this
                 _ < k^2 + k := by
                   rw [Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul (by norm_num)]
                   rw [mul_add, mul_comm (k^2), mul_comm k]
                   apply Nat.lt_add_left
                   calc 4 < 25 := by norm_num
                        _ ≤ k^2 := Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left hk_ge_5 2
                        _ ≤ k^2 + 2 * k := Nat.le_add_right _ _
         rw [hk] at this
         exact Nat.lt_of_add_lt_add_right this
    
    rw [hk]
    norm_cast
    rw [add_assoc, add_lt_add_iff_left]
    rw [Real.sqrt_lt_iff_sq_lt]
    · norm_cast
    · have : 2 * n > 0 := by
        apply Nat.mul_pos (by norm_num)
        apply Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_right (b := n)
        apply Nat.pos_of_lt_pow_right (Nat.zero_le _) 2
        exact Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.succ_pos _) hn_dvd) hp_gt_K)
      apply le_of_lt
      exact Real.sqrt_pos.mp (Real.sqrt_pos_of_pos (Nat.cast_pos.mpr this))

  use n, hn_ge_N, p, hp, hn_dvd, h_ineq

intro N
  -- Select a lower bound K such that p > K guarantees n >= N and avoids small exceptions.
  let K := max 20 (N ^ 2 + 1)
  
  -- Step 1: Prove there exists a prime p > K with p ≡ 1 (mod 4).
  have exists_prime : ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p > K ∧ p % 4 = 1 := by
    let M := Nat.factorial K
    let A := (2 * M) ^ 2 + 1
    let p := A.minFac
    have hA : A > 1 := Nat.one_lt_succ_succ _
    have hp : Nat.Prime p := Nat.minFac_prime (ne_of_gt hA)
    refine ⟨p, hp, ?_, ?_⟩
    · by_contra h_le
      have : p ∣ M := Nat.dvd_factorial (Nat.Prime.pos hp) (not_lt.mp h_le)
      have : p ∣ (2 * M) ^ 2 := Nat.dvd_pow (Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_right this 2) (by norm_num)
      have : p ∣ 1 := (Nat.dvd_add_iff_left this).mpr (Nat.minFac_dvd A)
      exact Nat.Prime.not_dvd_one hp this
    · exact Nat.Prime.mod_four_eq_one_of_dvd_pow_sq_add_one hp (Nat.minFac_dvd A)

  rcases exists_prime with ⟨p, hp, hp_gt, hp_mod4⟩

  -- Step 2: Construct n such that n^2 ≡ -1 (mod p) and 0 < n < p/2.
  have exists_n : ∃ n, n ≤ p / 2 ∧ n > 0 ∧ (n ^ 2 + 1) % p = 0 := by
    have : IsSquare (-1 : ZMod p) := ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_iff.mpr hp_mod4
    rcases this with ⟨x, hx⟩
    let n_val := x.val
    let n := if n_val ≤ p / 2 then n_val else p - n_val
    have hn_le : n ≤ p / 2 := by
      split_ifs with h
      · exact h
      · exact Nat.sub_le_div_two_of_lt_two_mul (Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul.mp (ZMod.val_lt x))
    refine ⟨n, hn_le, ?_, ?_⟩
    · by_contra h0
      rw [Nat.le_zero] at h0
      simp [h0] at hn_le
      -- If n=0, then n_val=0 or n_val=p. 
      -- x^2 = -1 in ZMod p => 0 = -1 => 1 = 0 => p | 1, impossible.
      simp [h0] at hx; ring_nf at hx
      have : (1 : ZMod p) = 0 := neg_eq_zero.mp hx.symm
      exact Nat.Prime.ne_one hp (ZMod.val_eq_zero this)
    · rw [Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd]
      apply ZMod.int_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd.mp
      -- n^2 + 1 = 0 in ZMod p
      have : (n : ZMod p) ^ 2 = -1 := by
        dsimp [n]
        split_ifs
        · exact hx
        · rw [ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_val, ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_val] at hx ⊢
          rw [cast_sub]
          simp; rw [sq, neg_mul_neg]; exact hx
      rw [Int.cast_add, Int.cast_pow, Int.cast_natCast, this, Int.cast_one, add_left_neg]

  rcases exists_n with ⟨n, hn_le, hn_pos, hn_mod⟩
  have hn_dvd : p ∣ n ^ 2 + 1 := Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero hn_mod

  -- Step 3: Verify n >= N.
  have hn_ge : n ≥ N := by
    have : p ≤ n^2 + 1 := Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.succ_pos _) hn_dvd
    have : n^2 ≥ p - 1 := le_tsub_of_add_le_right this
    have : p - 1 > N^2 := Nat.lt_sub_of_add_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (le_max_right _ _) hp_gt)
    exact Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.sqrt_lt_sqrt_iff.mp (lt_of_lt_of_le this (by assumption)))

  -- Step 4: Prove the inequality p > 2n + sqrt(2n).
  have ineq : (p : ℝ) > 2 * n + Real.sqrt (2 * n) := by
    by_contra h_le
    rw [not_lt] at h_le
    let d := p - 2 * n
    have hd_eq : p = 2 * n + d := (Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add (le_trans (by linarith) hn_le)).mp rfl
    
    -- From p <= 2n + sqrt(2n), we get d <= sqrt(2n).
    have hd_le_sqrt : (d : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt (2 * n) := by linarith
    have hd_sq_le : d^2 ≤ 2 * n := by
      rw [← Real.le_sqrt_iff (mul_nonneg (by norm_num) (Nat.cast_nonneg n))]
      assumption
    
    -- Show p | d^2 + 4.
    -- 4(n^2+1) = 4n^2 + 4. Since p | n^2+1, p | 4n^2+4.
    -- 2n = p - d => (2n)^2 = (p-d)^2 = p^2 - 2pd + d^2 == d^2 (mod p).
    -- So d^2 + 4 == 0 (mod p).
    have hd_dvd : p ∣ d ^ 2 + 4 := by
      have : (2 * n) ^ 2 + 4 = 4 * (n ^ 2 + 1) := by ring
      have : p ∣ (2 * n) ^ 2 + 4 := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hn_dvd 4
      rw [← Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd] at this ⊢
      rw [Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add (le_trans (by linarith) hn_le)] at hd_eq
      rw [hd_eq, Nat.add_sq] at this
      simp [Nat.add_mod] at this
      assumption

    -- Since d <= sqrt(2n) < sqrt(p), d^2 < p. So d^2 + 4 < p + 4.
    -- The only multiple of p in (0, p+4) is p itself. So d^2 + 4 = p.
    have hd_eq_p : d^2 + 4 = p := by
      have hd_lt_p : d^2 < p := lt_of_le_of_lt hd_sq_le (lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 hn_le) (Nat.lt_succ_self _)) 
      have : d^2 + 4 < 2 * p := by linarith
      apply Nat.eq_of_dvd_of_div_eq_one hd_dvd
      apply Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_one_right
      apply Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (Nat.Prime.pos hp)
      rw [← Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero] at hd_dvd
      rw [mul_one]
      refine le_antisymm (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (by linarith)) (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by linarith))

    -- Substitute p = d^2 + 4 into d^2 <= 2n = p - d.
    -- d^2 <= d^2 + 4 - d => d <= 4.
    have hd_le_4 : d ≤ 4 := by
      rw [hd_eq, hd_eq_p] at hd_sq_le
      linarith

    -- This implies p <= 4^2 + 4 = 20. But p > K >= 20. Contradiction.
    have hp_le_20 : p ≤ 20 := by rw [← hd_eq_p]; apply Nat.add_le_add_right; apply Nat.pow_le_pow_left; exact hd_le_4
    have hp_gt_20 : p > 20 := lt_of_le_of_lt (le_max_left 20 _) hp_gt
    linarith

  use n, hn_ge, p, hp, hn_dvd, ineq
